revision.comment: create
revision.text:
{{{2}}}
== Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself.

revision.comment: /* Documentation */ comment on navbox
revision.text:
{{{2}}}
== Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]].

{{{2}}}
== Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]]. [[category:Table and column templates]]

{{{2}}}
== Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]]. [[category:Table and column templates]]

{{{2}}}
 == Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]]. [[category:Table and column templates]]

{{{2}}}
 == Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]]. [[category:Table and column templates]]

revision.comment: added note about browser compatability.
revision.text:
{{{2}}}
 == Documentation == {{columns-list|''number of columns''| ''text (usually a list)'' }} Based on [[Template:Reflist]], but different in that the text to be displayed is manually created rather than a list of references. Also different from [[Template:Columns]] in that this template is intended to be used in a list in the article itself, rather than in a navigation template like [[Template:Navbox]]. Note: multiple columns currently render properly only in [[Mozilla Firefox]] and other [[Gecko (layout engine)|Gecko]]-based browsers{{cite web|accessdate=2006-11-24|date=[[2005-12-30]]|title=CSS3 Multi-Column Thriller|url=http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html}} and [[Safari (web browser)|Safari 3]],{{cite web |url=http://www.css3.info/preview/multi-column-layout.html |title=Multi-column layout in Safari 3 and Firefox |accessdate=2007-07-25}} though the feature is included in [[Cascading Style Sheets|CSS3]] so it should work for a larger number of browsers in the future.{{cite web|url=http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-multicol/|title=CSS3 module: Multi-column layout|publisher=[[World Wide Web Consortium|W3C]]|date=[[2005-12-15]]|accessdate=2006-11-24}} ==References== {{Reflist}} [[category:Table and column templates]]

revision.comment: split docs
revision.text:
{{{2}}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Columns-list: batch protection of templates on [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Unprotected templates with many transclusions/3|database report]] per [[WP:HRT]] using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=s
revision.text:
{{{2|{{{1|}}} }}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Columns-list: Restoring semi-protection per consensus at [[Wikipedia:Administrators'_noticeboard/IncidentArchive638#HJ_Mitchell_mass_fully_protecting_templates]]. Discussion is ongoing at WT:HRT - I won't consider it w
revision.text:
{{{2|{{{1|}}} }}}

revision.comment: update to match [[Template:div col]]
revision.text:
{{{2|{{{1|}}} }}}
{{documentation}}

{{{2|{{{1|}}} }}}
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: (semi)-merging with {{div col}}
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{div col/sandbox
 | cols = {{{1|}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Use {{div col}} (not sandbox)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{div col
 | cols = {{{1|}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{div col
 | cols = {{{cols|{{{1|}}}}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Test for empty content
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 | cols = {{{cols|{{{1|}}}}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.text:

 | cols = {{{cols|{{{1|}}}}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Columns-list: highly visisble template ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 | cols = {{{cols|{{{1|}}}}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add gap parameter per request
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 | cols = {{{cols|{{{1|}}}}}}
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removed support for deprecated parameter 1=/cols= causing display problems on many devices. Use colwidth with values larger than 30em instead.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add check for deprecated parameter 1=
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding unknown parameter tracking through [[:Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters]] using [[Module:check for unknown parameters]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add default 30em to match div col
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: commenting ignoreblank because I have found blank unnamed parameters breaking template usages
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|<!--ignoreblank=y-->| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision 850824541 by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]). doesn't help
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: All deprecated parameters have been removed in article space. Removing support for the unnamed first parameter (all 2= have been shifted to 1=).
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{1|}}}
}}}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision 851196936 by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]) Undo for now, breaking [[WP:RECOG]] template. See talk page
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{main other|{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. -->}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: removing "main other" for deprecated parameter check, since there is significant usage in the Wikipedia namespace
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. --></includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: rm parameter 2 from the unknown parameter check so that an error message will display in preview. Easier to find errors in long pages that way.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{div col
 <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for months for compatibility reasons, use more portable parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
}}}}{{#if: {{{2|}}}|[[Category: Pages using Columns-list with deprecated parameters]]|}}<!-- Note: This logic may seem counter-intuitive. We are looking for the supported parameter 2= (i.e. the content), because if it is present, that means parameter 1= is present. --></includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Update from sandbox; see talk page.
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
}}{{{1|}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add 2 param back in for viewing previous revisions of articles
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
{{{2|}}}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add class parameter for e.g. plainlist nowrap
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | class = {{{class|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
{{{2|}}}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: whitelist parameter class
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | class = {{{class|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
{{{2|}}}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: remove warning for 2 as it's not in the category of interest
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for compatibility reasons; use the more accessible parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | class = {{{class|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{1|}}}
}}}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Undid revision 1019341384 by [[Special:Contributions/Izno|Izno]] ([[User talk:Izno|talk]]). I'm not sure what this edit summary means. The message and display of 2= is backwards compatibility for old pages outside of mainspace. Discuss on talk if you want to.
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | class = {{{class|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
{{{2|}}}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: check all namespaces temporarily
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}} | gap = {{{gap|}}} | rules = {{{rules|}}} | small = {{{small|}}} | class = {{{class|}}} | style = {{{style|}}} | content = {{{1|}}}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|
The unnamed parameter 2= is no longer supported. Please see the documentation for {{tl|columns-list}}.
{{{2|}}}}} }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Back to Izno's version; removing support for 2= completely after instances cleaned up.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{div col <!-- Support for previous parameter 1= aka cols= has been removed after being deprecated for compatibility reasons; use the more accessible parameter colwidth= instead. -->
 | colwidth = {{{colwidth|30em}}}
 | gap = {{{gap|}}}
 | rules = {{{rules|}}}
 | small = {{{small|}}}
 | class = {{{class|}}}
 | style = {{{style|}}}
 | content = {{{1|}}}
}}}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: use [[Module:Template wrapper]] to simplify template
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=div col|_alias-map=1:content|colwidth=30em}}}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | content | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add safesubst
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=div col|_alias-map=1:content|colwidth=30em}}}}</includeonly>{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using columns-list with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | content | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Template‐ノート:Columns-list#改修提案（2021年12月）]]を参照
revision.text: <includeonly><templatestyles src="Columns-list/styles.css" />{{#invoke:Columns-list|main}}{{#if:{{#invoke:Columns-list|has_no_column_width}}|[[Category:Columns-list/列幅が指定されていない記事]]}}{{#if:{{#invoke:Columns-list|has_css_in_arg1}}|[[Category:Columns-list/第1引数に追加スタイルが指定されている記事]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: If we're making the meat of the template substable, the rest should be too
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Columns-list]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
If we're making the meat of the template substable, the rest should be too
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
If we're making the meat of the template substable, the rest should be too
65 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Columns-list]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
If we're making the meat of the template substable, the rest should be too
1 revision imported: fixing these
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Columns-list here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Columns-list for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#if:{{{1|}}}|{{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=div col|_alias-map=1:content|colwidth=30em}}}}{{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Columns-list]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | class | content | colwidth | gap | rules | small | style }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
